playbook.intent: 30-minute KPI scan: MRR / churn / activation / signup funnel reviewed, anomalies flagged, one experiment chosen for next week, one growth lever pushed.
playbook.scope: 30-minute KPI scan: MRR / churn / activation / signup funnel reviewed, anomalies flagged, one experiment chosen for next week, one growth lever pushed.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Open the dashboard
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a full snapshot saved.

stage.name: Anomaly investigation
stage.intent: Probe each anomaly until it has a cause.

tasks.task: Drill into the largest anomaly first
Tag root cause: known / unknown / noise

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every anomaly is tagged.

stage.name: Pick one experiment
stage.intent: One change, one metric, next week.

tasks.task: List 2-3 experiment candidates from this weeks signal
Pick one with the clearest expected impact

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with exactly one experiment selected.

stage.name: Push one growth lever
stage.intent: Ship one concrete growth action today.

tasks.task: Pick a lever (cold outreach / content / referral nudge)
Execute the action right now in this slot
Log the action and the channel

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the action actually shipped (not just planned).

stage.name: Close the loop
stage.intent: Write the pulse and queue Monday actions.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the pulse doc is committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content friday-metrics-check-mrr-pulse --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-metrics-check-mrr-pulse --format context, json: faion get-content friday-metrics-check-mrr-pulse --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
